component.name: Dasher
component.summary: Enter text without a keyboard using zooming predictive input

description.p: Dasher is a zooming, predictive text-entry system for situations where a keyboard is impractical, such as accessibility needs or limited physical input. It is driven by continuous pointing — mouse, touch, gaze, joystick or a single switch — letting you write at high rates with very little physical effort.
This is the GTK 4 front-end, built on the shared DasherCore engine.
Early development build of the GTK 4 front-end.
